# Searching for a Zscaler Client Connector Profile

**Source:** https://help.zscaler.com/zscaler-client-connector/searching-app-profile
**Captured:** 2026-04-26 via Playwright MCP (innerText extraction of <article>).

---

Zscaler Client Connector Help 
Zscaler Client Connector Profile Management 
Searching for a Zscaler Client Connector Profile
Client Connector
Searching for a Zscaler Client Connector Profile
Ask Zscaler

You can quickly find a specific Zscaler Admin Console Profile using the Search field by selecting different criteria to narrow down your search results.

To find a Zscaler Admin Console Profile using the Search field:

In the Zscaler Admin Console Portal, go to App Profiles.
In the Search field, select a search option from the drop-down menu. You can search using the following criteria:
Policy Name
Group Name
Policy Token
Enter search words and press Enter to display your search results.

To clear the Search field, delete the search term you typed and press Enter.
